verses.text: ‘Twas grace that taught my heart to fear, and grace my fears relieved; how precious did that grace appear the hour I first believed! Public Domain
Thro’ many dangers, toils, and snares, I have already come; ‘tis grace has brought me safe thus far, and grace will lead me home. Public Domain Public Domain
The Lord has promised good to me, his Word my hope secures; he will my shield and portion be, as long as life endures. Public Domain
And when this flesh and heart shall fail, and mortal life shall cease, I shall possess within the veil a life of joy and peace. Public Domain
When we’ve been there ten thousand years, bright shining as the sun, we’ve no less days to sing God’s praise than when we’ve first begun.
